nodes.name: Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.
Check Shift approval and Shift status.

parameters.filterByFormula: ={Employee ID}={{ $('Set the worker\'s status as \'Accepted\'').item.json.fields['Employee ID'].toJsonString() }}

nodes.name: Check the Database for Matched Worker's Data

parameters.filterByFormula: ={Full Name} = {{ $('Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.').first().json['Worker Replaced'].toJsonString() }}

nodes.name: Search Records of Call Off Worker

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "message": { "subject": "Shift Request Approval", "body": { "contentType": "HTML", "content": "Call-Off Replacement Acceptance

📋 Call-Off Replacement Acceptance

The below worker would like to accept the shift that requires coverage. Details below.

✔️Replacement Candidate
Full Name:" + $('Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.').item.json['Full Name'] + "
Employee ID:" + $('Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.').item.json['Employee ID'] + "
Phone No.:" + $('Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.').item.json.Phone + "
Email:" + $('Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.').item.json.Email + "
📅Call-Off Worker
Full Name:" + $('Search Records of Call Off Worker').item.json['Full Name'] + "
Employee ID:" + $('Search Records of Call Off Worker').item.json['Employee ID'] + "
Phone No.:" + $('Search Records of Call Off Worker').item.json['Phone (Formatted)'] + "
Email:" + $('Search Records of Call Off Worker').item.json.Email + "
Location:" + $json['Location Name/Code'] + "
Open Approval Form

Click the button to submit your decision.

" }, "toRecipients": [{ "emailAddress": { "address": "frank@elitesecurityspecialists.com" } }] }, "saveToSentItems": true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ "message": { "subject": "❌ Matched Worker Declined Shift — " + ($('Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.').first()?.json?.fields?.['Full Name'] || 'Unknown Worker'), "body": { "contentType": "HTML", "content": "Worker Declined Shift

❌ Worker Declined Shift

Elite Security Specialists

" + ($('Check whether Phone no. is present in the Database.').item.json['Full Name']|| 'Unknown Worker') + " has declined to cover this shift.

No further action is required.

This is an automated notification from ESS Call-Off Management System.

" },"toRecipients": [ { "emailAddress": { "address": "frank@elitesecurityspecialists.com" } }, { "emailAddress": { "address": "Robert@elitesecurityspecialists.com" } }, { "emailAddress": { "address": "thomas@elitesecurityspecialists.com" } }, { "emailAddress": { "address": "Odilia@elitesecurityspecialists.com" } }, { "emailAddress": { "address": "ivy@aisus.ai" } }, { "emailAddress": { "address": "info@siliconstreamtechnology.com" } } ] }, "saveToSentItems": true }) }}
